message:
feat(fnp-python): native allclose via UFuncArray::allclose_equal_nan

Port np.allclose fast path to Rust. Extracts both inputs via
extract_precise_numeric_array, short-circuits on complex, integer
sidecar, or dtype-extract failures to np.allclose so numpy's full
coercion surface (bytes, object arrays, exotic broadcast) stays exact.
Return is wrapped via np.bool_ to preserve numpy's scalar-bool return
type.

br-franken_numpy-hswc
